name: ZAYTUNA COLLEGE
mission: Zaytuna College aims to educate and prepare morally committed professional, intellectual, and spiritual leaders, who are grounded in the Islamic scholar...
programs: BA in Liberal and Islamic Studies
Center for Ethical Living and Learning (ZCELL)
theoryOfChange: By training the mind through the trivium and quadrivium alongside Islamic primary texts, the college produces leaders who can navigate modern society with moral and spiritual grounding.

evaluationSources: Accredited by WASC Senior College and University Commission (WSCUC)

zakatClaimEvidence: According to many scholars, institutions such as Zaytuna College meet the requirements for zakat eligibility. However, we have chosen to limit the zakat funds only to the total cost of education for zakat eligible students and not for any other institutional expenditures. We take this sacred trust very seriously, so if you choose to give a portion of your zakat to Zaytuna College, we will do our utmost, God willing, to ensure its most judicious and shariah compliant use. (Source: https://zaytuna.edu/ways-to-give)

ui_signals_v1.recommendation_rationale: Context dependent profile. Consider cause fit, risk profile, and evidence maturity before deciding.

components.evidence: Explicit zakat program (+4); Muslim-focused organization (+2); Islamic identity (+1)
components.improvement_suggestion: Clarify zakat allocation policy and eligible use categories for donors.
components.name: Muslim Donor Fit

alignment.rationale: Alignment 29/50: MEDIUM Muslim donor fit, education global cause area

components.improvement_suggestion: Publish beneficiary counts consistently so cost-effectiveness can be assessed.
components.name: Cost Per Beneficiary

components.improvement_suggestion: Publish a time-bound plan to deploy excess unrestricted reserves into mission delivery, while keeping a clear operating reserve floor.
components.name: Financial Health

components.improvement_suggestion: Document a clear theory of change with an explicit causal pathway.
components.name: Theory of Change

risks.description: No outcome measurement or metrics tracking

score_details.score_summary: ZAYTUNA COLLEGE shows good alignment and moderate impact, with zakat compliance (minor risk deductions applied).

zakat.claim_evidence: According to many scholars, institutions such as Zaytuna College meet the requirements for zakat eligibility. However, we have chosen to limit the zakat funds only to the total cost of education for zakat eligible students and not for any other institutional expenditures. We take this sacred trust very seriously, so if you choose to give a portion of your zakat to Zaytuna College, we will do our utmost, God willing, to ensure its most judicious and shariah compliant use. (Source: https://zaytuna.edu/ways-to-give)

all_citations.claim: The organization reported a program expense ratio of 56.0%.
Total revenue for the period was $18,359,667.
Zaytuna College aims to educate morally committed leaders grounded in the Islamic scholarly tradition.
The college offers a Bachelor of Arts in Liberal Arts and Islamic Studies and a Summer Arabic Intensive.
The institution maintains formal accreditation status for its degree programs.
The charity is zakat-eligible and provides various ways to give.

baseline_narrative.amal_score_rationale: The college earns a moderate overall score due to its unique educational niche and exceptional working capital, balanced against a program expense ratio that suggests significant spending on administrative or fundraising overhead.
areas_for_improvement: The program expense ratio of 56.0% is lower than the industry benchmark for educational institutions
Limited public data regarding specific long-term student career outcomes and beneficiary impact metrics

dimension_explanations.alignment: Zaytuna College shows medium alignment for donors interested in global education and Islamic scholarship, as it is the first of its kind in the American higher education landscape [3][7]. The institution is zakat-eligible, providing a specific religious pathway for charitable giving within the Muslim community [8].
dimension_explanations.impact: The college focuses on capacity building by educating future leaders through its Bachelor of Arts in Liberal Arts and Islamic Studies and Summer Arabic Intensive [3][4]. While the institution maintains a robust financial position with 33.6 months of working capital, its impact score reflects a program expense ratio of 56.0%, indicating that a portion of its $18,359,667 revenue is directed toward non-programmatic costs [1][2].

baseline_narrative.headline: Zaytuna College serves as the first accredited Muslim liberal arts college in the United States, dedicated to grounding students in both Islamic and Western scholarly traditions.
strengths: Maintains a high level of financial stability with 33.6 months of working capital
Demonstrates strong fundraising efficiency, spending only $0.11 to raise every $1
Offers specialized accredited degree programs including a Master of Arts in Islamic Texts
baseline_narrative.summary: Zaytuna College aims to educate morally committed professional and intellectual leaders through a curriculum rooted in the Islamic scholarly tradition [3]. The institution reported a total revenue of $18,359,667 and operates as a zakat-eligible entity for qualifying educational support [2][8].
